jobs_idempotency_live_idx.name: jobs_idempotency_live_idx
jobs_idempotency_live_idx.where: status in ('pending','active') and idempotency_key is not null

revision_cycles_dedupe_planned_uq.name: revision_cycles_dedupe_planned_uq
revision_cycles_dedupe_planned_uq.where: status = 'planned' and dedupe_key is not null
